series_metadata.series_title: Construction Management System Concrete Field Test Documentation
series_metadata.series_description: This includes support information including TE-45, supplier batch tickets, and material test worksheets. The MATERIAL TEST WORKSHEETS contain the hand written notations, internal lab numbers and test results obtained by ODOT technicians during the physical testing of a sample of a Producer/Supplier''s material.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain on shared electronic drive permanently., Electronic: Permanent
